commands_run: cd api && python3 -m pytest tests/test_mcp_remote_no_oauth.py tests/test_agent_control_plane.py -q

cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/main.py app/routers/mcp_remote.py app/services/maintainability_audit_service.py app/services/agent_service_pipeline_status.py tests/test_mcp_remote_no_oauth.py tests/test_agent_control_plane.py

cd api && python3 -m py_compile app/main.py app/routers/mcp_remote.py app/services/maintainability_audit_service.py app/services/agent_service_pipeline_status.py tests/test_mcp_remote_no_oauth.py tests/test_agent_control_plane.py
cd web && npm ci --allow-git=none && npm run build
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
failure_reason: Custom connector setup was prompting for OAuth because there was no hosted no-auth MCP contract. This task adds unauthenticated read-only MCP JSON-RPC endpoints at /mcp and /api/mcp, bumps coherence-mcp-server to 0.5.2 for npm publication, and fixes publish guard blockers for maintainability, home-route links, literal route labels, and the duplicate people slug route conflict.
